name: Garurumon (Black)

signature_move.name: Foxfire
signature_move.description: Breathes high-temperature flames from its mouth.

description: A Virus attribute Garurumon . The blades extending from its shoulders are so sharp that they slice apart anything they touch. It loves collecting bones and burying them in the ground, though there appear to have been cases of these bones being quietly stolen away by prank-loving Drimogemon . Its Special Move is breathing blue, high-temperature flames from its mouth ( Foxfire ).
